name: agent-provider-monorepo
description: Browser-mediated, user-controlled model access for trusted web applications.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @agent-provider/protocol && npm run build -w @agent-provider/context && npm run build -w @agent-provider/ai-sdk && npm run build -w @agent-provider/runtime && npm run build -w @agent-provider/react && npm run build -w @agent-provider/webmcp
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:extension && npm run build:firefox && npm run build:example
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:browser: npm run build:packages && npm run build:extension && node scripts/test-extension-browser.mjs
scripts.test:browser:live: npm run build:packages && npm run build:extension && node scripts/test-extension-browser.mjs --live
scripts.test:firefox: npm run build:packages && npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir apps/extension/.output/firefox-mv3 && node scripts/test-extension-firefox.mjs
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:packages
